query: soft focus dreamy hazy out of focus portrait
message: sub:intentional_blur/soft_focus — anti_aesthetic — dreamy hazy out-of-focus portraits, vaseline lens, soft veil

response.objective_caption: A person shown in profile facing left occupies the right portion of the frame amid warm yellow, amber, and green tones. A pale cyan rectangular area appears on the left. The composition is built from broad color fields that shift gradually across the scene.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A person's face in profile on the right is rendered almost unrecognizable by extreme motion blur and smeared, absent textures, causing features to dissolve into broad amber, yellow, and green color fields. A pale cyan area on the left bleeds into the surrounding warmth. The image completely lacks fine detail, functioning as an abstract composition where the subject melds with the background in a hazy, dreamlike manner.
